reason: Web sources universally confirm Charlie is the only Weasley not shown on screen in the films - he is entirely absent, not merely reduced. The justifications accurately describe the Norbert handoff, GoF dragon coordination, Order recruitment, and Battle of Hogwarts roles all being cut or transferred. The one minor quibble: the score of 61 feels slightly generous given Charlie has zero on-screen presence (not just reduced presence), but the scorer's own reasoning acknowledges this and the arc dimension rationale (flat arc not contradicted) is a reasonable basis for partial credit. The factual claims in the justifications are all accurate per fan/critic consensus.
